entry.title: Firefly Aerospace Receives $13 Million NASA JPL Subcontract to Build Aeroshell for SkyFall Mars Mission
entry.summary: Firefly to leverage proven composite manufacturing expertise from its lunar landers and rockets to enable next generation of Mars exploration.

entry.title: Firefly Aerospace Awarded $144 Million NASA CLPS Contract for Accelerated Blue Ghost Lunar Mission
entry.summary: Firefly mission accelerates Moon delivery timeline and enables repeatable lunar access with flight proven lunar lander.

entry.title: Firefly Aerospace and SSC Space Meet Next Critical Milestone for Orbital Launch from Esrange Space Center
entry.summary: With key infrastructure and agreements in place, companies progress pad construction at Launch Complex 3C for Firefly’s Alpha rocket.

entry.title: Firefly Aerospace Acquires Space-ng to Advance Future of Autonomous Space Operations
entry.summary: Space-ng's technologies utilized during Blue Ghost M1 strengthens Firefly capabilities to enable repeatable missions to the Moon and beyond.

entry.title: Firefly Subsidiary SciTec Awarded U.S. Air Force Contract Option to Deliver Data Fusion Capabilities for Advanced Battle Management System
entry.summary: SciTec’s cloud-based data fusion system supports homeland defense for NORAD, USNORTHCOM, and PACAF.

entry.title: Firefly Aerospace Announces Launch of Proposed Public Offering of Common Stock
entry.summary: Firefly today announced the commencement of a public offering of its common stock by Firefly and certain selling stockholders.

entry.title: Firefly Aerospace Wins $75 Million NASA JPL MoonFall Subcontract to Deliver Drones to the Moon’s South Pole
entry.summary: Firefly’s Elytra spacecraft will deliver four drones above the lunar south pole to support NASA’s MoonFall mission and Moon Base initiatives.

entry.title: Firefly Aerospace Accelerates Spacecraft Production with Expanded Campus and Innovation Lab in Central Texas
entry.summary: *Rendering of Firefly’s new cleanroom at its spacecraft facility in Cedar Park, Texas; Credit: Firefly Aerospace CEDAR PARK, Texas, May 19, 2026 – Firefly Aerospace (Nasdaq: FLY), a market leading space and defense technology company, today announced the company moved into a new headquarters, expanded its cleanroom space, and added an innovation lab to support...

entry.title: Firefly Aerospace Subsidiary SciTec Awarded AFRL Contract for Advanced Algorithm R&D and Verification Architecture
entry.summary: Firefly Aerospace Subsidiary SciTec awarded a Contract with AFRL for Advanced Algorithm R&D and Verification Architecture

entry.title: Firefly Aerospace Subsidiary SciTec Receives Agreement to Advance Space Force’s Space-Based Missile Defense Under Golden Dome
entry.summary: Firefly's SciTec subsidiary selected to support $3.2 billion Space-Based Interceptor program for Golden Dome.
